issues.title: Missing Header Navigation
issues.description: The page at /collections/all has no visible header or navigation bar. This issue affects 2 pages: /collections/all, /collections/thc-a.

issues.title: No Call-to-Action Found
issues.description: No CTA buttons or links were detected on /pages/contact. This issue affects 3 pages: /pages/contact, /collections/all, /collections/thc-a.

issues.title: Missing Footer
issues.description: No footer is visible on /collections/all. This issue affects 2 pages: /collections/all, /collections/thc-a.

issues.title: No Logo Detected
issues.description: The page /collections/all does not display a visible logo. This issue affects 2 pages: /collections/all, /collections/thc-a.

opportunitySummary.title: Growth Opportunities Identified
opportunitySummary.description: Addressing these items can directly impact your search rankings, page speed, and user engagement.

items.opportunity: Reduce JavaScript blocking time (TBT up to 0.56s) — heavy JS is delaying interactivity on 3 pages.
Improve mobile performance (score as low as 52/100) on 1 page — mobile users are seeing much slower experiences than desktop.
Fix failed network requests — up to 7 failures per page across 8 pages.
Add call-to-action buttons to 3 pages — visitors have no clear conversion path.
Resolve navigation issues across 8 pages — fix broken anchors and link structure.
Add consistent header/footer on 2 pages — missing navigation breaks user flow.

categoryScorecard.title: How Your Site Performs by Category

categories.name: Page Health
categories.description: HTTP status, console errors, failed requests, and reliability

categories.name: Page Speed
categories.description: First Contentful Paint, Largest Contentful Paint, TTFB, and Total Blocking Time

categories.name: Resource Efficiency
categories.description: Speed Index (desktop + mobile) and mobile vs desktop rendering efficiency

categories.name: Mobile Experience
categories.description: Responsiveness across mobile, tablet, and desktop viewports

categories.name: Navigation & Links
categories.description: Broken links, anchor integrity, and navigation health

categories.name: Layout & UX
categories.description: Header, footer, logo, CTAs, and page structure completeness
